title: read-pyproject-toml — output
description: Typed extract of the load-bearing fields from a pyproject.toml file. Per the Blue invariant we describe only the fields the discover-project Workflow actually consumes.

name.description: The [project] table's `name` field (PEP 621) or [tool.poetry] `name`; null if absent or the manifest does not exist.

version.description: The [project] table's `version` field (PEP 621) or [tool.poetry] `version`; null if absent.

dependencies_count.description: Total count of declared runtime dependencies across [project.dependencies] + [tool.poetry.dependencies]. Zero if absent.
